mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_NO , USER_ID , TITLE , CATEGORY , CREATE_DATE , CONTENT , UPDATED , DELETED FROM QUESTION_BOARD
DELETED = 'N'
AND CATEGORY = #{category}
ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUESTION_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
AND CATEGORY = #{category}
SELECT BOARD_NO , USER_ID , TITLE , CATEGORY , CREATE_DATE , CONTENT , UPDATED , DELETED FROM QUESTION_BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT WRITER FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
